x-enumeration-literals.name: Customer Need Analysis
x-enumeration-literals.description: Understanding the needs, preferences, buying behaviors, and decision-making processes of the target customers. This often includes analyzing customer demographics and psychographics

x-enumeration-literals.name: Competitive Analysis
x-enumeration-literals.description: Identifying key competitors in the market, assessing their strengths and weaknesses, and understanding their strategies. This helps in determining the competitive landscape and positioning a business accordingly

x-enumeration-literals.name: Channel Distribution Analysis
x-enumeration-literals.description: Analyzing how products or services are delivered to customers, including the effectiveness and efficiency of these channels

x-enumeration-literals.name: Pricing Behavior Analsysis
x-enumeration-literals.description: Analyzing pricing in the market, understanding how price affects consumer behavior, and determining the best pricing strategy for a product or service.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Market Segmentation Analysis
x-enumeration-literals.description: Customer segmentation involves dividing a customer base into distinct groups with similar characteristics. To effectively perform customer segmentation, various specific analyses are applied, each providing insights into different aspects of the customer base like Needs-Based Analysis, Value-Based Segmentation, Cohort Analysis.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Market Forecasting
x-enumeration-literals.description: Predicting future market conditions based on current data, trends, and statistical models. This can help businesses anticipate changes and plan accordingly
